column1: # Conjunctions & connective forms (接続詞・接続助詞) — words that link clauses.
# Belongs here: sentence-initial connectives (しかし, だから, それで, つまり) and
# bound connective forms (ので, から). Single-mora clause particles (が, し) live
# in particles.tsv; multi-mora bound patterns in sentence-patterns.tsv.

column4: and then; so; because of that
in other words; that is to say
